info.title: Project Management API
info.description: API documentation for the PMS backend

get.description: Returns the latest 50 activities for the current workspace.
Returns the latest 50 activities for the specified project.
Returns a list of all epics in the specified project.

post.description: Creates a new epic in the specified project.

get.description: Returns details of a specific epic.
Returns a list of all labels in the current workspace.

post.description: Creates a new label in the current workspace.

get.description: Returns details of a specific label.
Returns a list of projects in the current workspace.

post.description: Creates a new project in the current workspace.

get.description: Returns details of a specific project.

post.description: Toggles the favorite status of a project.

get.description: Returns a list of members in the project.

post.description: Adds a member to the project.

user_id.description: ID of the user to add

delete.description: Removes a member from the project.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The ID of the user to remove

get.description: Returns a list of all sprints in the specified project.

post.description: Creates a new sprint in the specified project.

get.description: Returns details of a specific sprint.

carry_over_sprint_id.description: ID of the sprint to carry over issues to

post.description: Adds an issue to the sprint.

delete.description: Removes an issue from the sprint.
